title: TritonParse IR Analysis Event
description: Generated during processing for each compilation event. Contains analysis of the intermediate representation, including pattern detection such as BlockPingpong.

hash.description: Kernel hash identifying the compiled kernel.

ir_analysis.description: Analysis results keyed by analysis type. Currently supports blockpingpong, io_counts, and loop_schedules.

loop_schedules.description: Loop schedule analysis showing pipelined operation mapping to Python source lines.

occurrence_id.description: Global ordering index across all events.

BlockPingpongResult.description: Result of BlockPingpong scheduling detection and categorization.

category.description: BlockPingpong category: 'none' if not detected, 'pingpong_small' (4 warps, 1 PP cluster), 'pingpong_medium' (8 warps, 2 PP clusters), 'pingpong_large' (8 warps, 4 PP clusters).

num_warps.description: Number of warps (4 or 8), or null if not detected.

num_pp_clusters.description: Number of pingpong clusters (1, 2, or 4), or null if not detected.

cond_barrier_count.description: Number of conditional barrier operations found.

dot_count.description: Number of tt.dot operations found in loops.

IOCounts.description: AMD buffer operation counts from TTGIR and GCN IR.

LoopSchedule.description: Pipelined loop schedule mapping IR operations to Python source lines.

prologue.description: Python source lines mapped to prologue operations.

loop_body.description: Python source lines mapped to loop body operations.

epilogue.description: Python source lines mapped to epilogue operations.
